headline: New York Yankees acquired Alex Rodriguez from the Texas Rangers
mystery: Who was the key player Texas received in return?
context: Reds GM Bill DeWitt called A-Rod's Rangers deal 'not good business.' Soriano hit 28 HR in his first Texas season. A-Rod later admitted to PED use during his Rangers years.

headline: Los Angeles Dodgers acquired Mookie Betts from the Boston Red Sox
mystery: Who was the main player Boston received in return?
context: Betts signed a 12-year, $365M extension with LA and helped the Dodgers win the 2020 World Series. Verdugo became Boston's everyday center fielder.

headline: Cincinnati Reds acquired Ken Griffey Jr. from the Seattle Mariners
mystery: Who was the key player Seattle received in return?
additionalPieces: Brett Tomko + Antonio Perez + Jake Meyer
context: Cameron became an All-Star and won four Gold Gloves in Seattle. Griffey battled injuries in Cincinnati, never recapturing his Seattle peak.

headline: Houston Astros acquired Randy Johnson from the Seattle Mariners
mystery: Who was the top prospect Seattle received in return?
context: Garcia went 17-8 in his first full Seattle season. Johnson went 10-1 with a 1.28 ERA for Houston down the stretch before becoming a free agent.

headline: Boston Red Sox acquired Pedro Martinez from the Montreal Expos
mystery: Who was the main prospect Boston sent to Montreal?
context: Pedro won back-to-back Cy Youngs in Boston (1999–2000) with a sub-2.00 ERA in 1999. Pavano later signed a 4-year, $39.95M deal with the Yankees — famously one of their worst free agent signings.

headline: Chicago Cubs acquired Sammy Sosa from the Chicago White Sox
mystery: Who was the key veteran the White Sox received?
context: Bell was a former AL MVP but only lasted two seasons in Chicago. Sosa hit 609 career home runs as a Cub, including the legendary 1998 home run race with Mark McGwire.

headline: Florida Marlins acquired Mike Piazza from the Los Angeles Dodgers
mystery: Who was the biggest name Los Angeles received in return?
additionalPieces: Charles Johnson + Bobby Bonilla + Jim Eisenreich + Manuel Barrios
context: Piazza was traded again just one week later to the Mets, where he became a legend. Sheffield went on to hit 509 career home runs. LA received 5 players but got the worst of the deal.

headline: Milwaukee Brewers acquired CC Sabathia from the Cleveland Indians
mystery: Who was the #1 prospect Cleveland received in return?
additionalPieces: Zach Jackson + Rob Bryson + Taylor Green
context: LaPorta was considered the top hitting prospect in baseball. CC went 11-2 with a 1.65 ERA in Milwaukee, powering the Brewers to the playoffs before signing a 7-year, $161M deal with the Yankees.

headline: Milwaukee Brewers acquired Zack Greinke from the Kansas City Royals
mystery: Who was the key outfielder Kansas City received in return?
additionalPieces: Alcides Escobar + Jeremy Jeffress + Jake Odorizzi
context: Cain and Escobar were cornerstones of the 2015 Royals World Series championship team. Greinke won the NL Cy Young in Milwaukee.

headline: Houston Astros acquired Gerrit Cole from the Pittsburgh Pirates
mystery: Who was the top pitching prospect Pittsburgh received in return?
additionalPieces: Colin Moran + Michael Feliz + Jason Martin
context: Musgrove threw the first no-hitter in San Diego Padres history in 2021. Cole signed a record 9-year, $324M deal with the Yankees in 2019.

headline: Chicago White Sox acquired James Shields from the San Diego Padres
mystery: Who was the Padres' 17-year-old prospect sent in return?
context: Shields went 4-10 with a 6.77 ERA for the White Sox. Tatis Jr. — considered a throw-in at the time — became the Padres' franchise cornerstone and signed a 14-year, $340M extension.

headline: Baltimore Orioles acquired Frank Robinson from the Cincinnati Reds
mystery: Who was the main pitcher Cincinnati received in return?
context: Reds GM Bill DeWitt called Robinson 'an old 30.' In his first Baltimore season, Robinson won the Triple Crown and MVP, and led the Orioles to the World Series. Pappas had a solid career but was not in Robinson's class.

headline: Philadelphia Phillies acquired Ivan DeJesus from the Chicago Cubs
mystery: Who was the young Phillies farmhand the Cubs received along with Larry Bowa?
context: The Phillies asked for Sandberg as a throw-in. He went on to win 9 Gold Gloves, the 1984 NL MVP, and was inducted into the Hall of Fame in 2005. Widely considered the worst trade in Phillies history.

headline: Oakland Athletics acquired Jon Lester from the Boston Red Sox
mystery: Who was the exciting slugger Boston received in return?
context: Cespedes became an instant Red Sox fan favorite with his cannon arm and power. Lester signed a 6-year, $155M deal with the Cubs after the trade, helping them end their 108-year World Series drought.

headline: New York Yankees acquired Giancarlo Stanton from the Miami Marlins
mystery: Who was the key infielder Miami received in return?
context: Stanton had a 10-and-5 no-trade clause and approved only a handful of teams. The Yankees also took on $265M remaining on his $325M contract — then the largest in baseball history.

headline: Houston Astros acquired Justin Verlander from the Detroit Tigers
mystery: Who was Houston's top pitching prospect sent to Detroit?
context: Verlander went 5-0 with a 1.06 ERA after the trade, helping Houston win the 2017 World Series. He later won the 2019 AL Cy Young. The deadline deal was made with just seconds to spare.

headline: New York Mets acquired Francisco Lindor from the Cleveland Indians
mystery: Who was the slick-fielding infielder Cleveland received in return?
additionalPieces: Amed Rosario + Isaiah Greene + Josh Wolf
context: Gimenez finished 2nd in AL Rookie of the Year voting in 2022 and won back-to-back Gold Gloves. Lindor signed a 10-year, $341M extension with the Mets shortly after the trade.

headline: Philadelphia Phillies acquired Cliff Lee from the Cleveland Indians
mystery: Who was the pitching prospect Cleveland received in return?
additionalPieces: Jason Donald + Lou Marson + Jason Knapp
context: Carrasco became a dependable Cleveland starter for over a decade, making two All-Star teams. Lee went 4-0 in the 2009 postseason and helped the Phillies reach the World Series.

headline: Montreal Expos acquired Bartolo Colon from the Cleveland Indians
mystery: Who was the young outfielder Cleveland received in return?
additionalPieces: Cliff Lee + Brandon Phillips + Lee Stevens
context: Sizemore became a three-time All-Star and two-time Gold Glove winner. Lee became an ace. Phillips became a perennial All-Star. Cleveland also got Cliff Lee — one of the greatest trades in franchise history.

headline: California Angels acquired Nolan Ryan from the New York Mets
mystery: Who was the shortstop the Mets received in return?
additionalPieces: Lee Stanton + Don Rose + Francisco Estrada
context: Fregosi was past his prime and lasted just 146 games as a Met. Ryan threw 4 of his 7 no-hitters with California and struck out a then-record 383 batters in 1973. Widely considered one of the worst trades ever.
